## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or pipeline component
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `data` — Data pipeline or dataset changes
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `test` — New or updated tests
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance (dependency update, cleanup)
- [ ] `exp` — Experimental (not ready for main)

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->

- [ ] Ran existing tests: `pytest tests/ -m "not integration"`
- [ ] Added new tests for new behaviour
- [ ] Verified no regressions in the affected modules
- [ ] Tested with real data (if applicable — note dataset and conditions)

---

## Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] `black` formatter has been run
- [ ] `isort` has been run
- [ ] `ruff` returns zero errors
- [ ] `mypy` passes (or known type stubs are missing — documented below)
- [ ] All new functions and classes have Google-style docstrings
- [ ] No hardcoded file paths, credentials, or magic numbers

---

## Documentation

- [ ] Relevant `README.md` files updated
- [ ] `docs/` updated if architecture or pipeline design changed
- [ ] Config files documented if new parameters added
- [ ] Notebook cleaned of outputs (`nbstripout`)
